links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The plain-crested elaenia (Elaenia cristata) is a species of bird in subfamily Elaeniinae of family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, French Guiana, Guyana, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

links.evidence: It also occurs in isolated populations in Caquetá and Vaupés departments in southeastern Colombia, in Cuzco and Madre de Dios departments in southeastern Peru, in La Paz and Beni departments in northern Bolivia, and in Rondônia state in western Amazonian Brazil

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: alticola is found only in the tepuis of southeastern Venezuela and adjacent northwestern Brazil. The plain-crested elaenia primarily inhabits savanna; it also occurs in open park-like savanna woodlands, scrubby areas, and cerrado
